name: ttt-mcp
description: Prevents context amnesia in Claude Code Dynamic Workflows. External cryptographic timestamps survive context compression — agents recover exact action history via O(1) SHA-3 eventId lookup (2⁻²⁵⁶ collision probability). Causal DAG via prevEventId. 6 tools: pot_generate, pot_verify, pot_query, pot_graph, pot_stats, pot_health. Also: MEV ordering proofs, MiFIR Art.22c audit trail.
